snapshot.source_name: Democracy Club Candidates API — results endpoint
snapshot.licence: Democracy Club election data is published under CC0 1.0 for raw fields; party metadata sourced from Electoral Commission (OGL).
snapshot.review_notes: Bulk fetch of all DC results, filtered to May 2026 scope councils + national tiers. Per-result `source` is the official declaration PDF.

note: Full result bundle (52MB) is gitignored; regenerate via node scripts/ingest-dc-historic-results.mjs (uses .cache/dc-results pages).
